## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `hotfix` — Critical production fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — Build process / dependency update
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change

## Branch Checklist (GitFlow)

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/`, `bugfix/`, `hotfix/`, `release/`)
- [ ] Targeting the correct base branch (`develop` for features/bugfixes, `main` for hotfixes/releases)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
